PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELDMAN, GENNADY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAMES, STEVE THAT THE DEFENDANT STEVE SHAMES IS FOUND LIABLE TO THE PLAINTIFF GENNADY FELDMAN IN THE SUM OF $7,200.00.
